home.title: iSolveUrProblems.ai - beta
home.subtitle: Your Home & Garden Solution Center
home.restartPrompt: Wanna use again? Press the button below 👇

signIn.title: Sign in to iSolveUrProblems
signIn.blurb: 6 can keep talking to you anonymously — sign in only when you want your fix-it reports delivered or 6 to remember you next time.
signIn.checkEmail: Check your email for the sign-in link.

errors.callbackFailed: Sign-in callback failed. Please try again.

memory.title: What 6 remembers about you
memory.blurb: 6 keeps short notes between conversations so it doesn't make you repeat yourself. You're in control — you can forget any single note, or wipe everything.
memory.signInRequired: Sign in to see what 6 remembers about you.
memory.loadError: Couldn't load your notes. Please try again.
memory.empty: 6 hasn't remembered anything about you yet.
memory.forgetAllConfirm: Forget everything 6 remembers about you? This can't be undone.

reports.generating: 6 is putting your report together. This usually takes 10–30 seconds — refresh in a moment.
reports.failed: Something went wrong while generating this report

deliver.title: Send this report to yourself
deliver.blurb: Pick how you'd like to receive it. You can change this any time on your account.

channel.emailMissing: (add an email to your account first)
channel.whatsappSub: We'll send the link via WhatsApp.
channel.whatsappDisabled: WhatsApp is not available yet — coming soon.

deliver.consentSms: I agree to receive an SMS at this number from iSolveUrProblems with my report link. Message and data rates may apply. Reply STOP to opt out.
deliver.consentWhatsapp: I agree to receive a WhatsApp message at this number with my report link.
deliver.needsSmsConsent: Tick the consent box to send by SMS.
deliver.needsWaConsent: Tick the consent box to send by WhatsApp.
deliver.signInRequired: Sign in to deliver this report.

contractors.title: Find a contractor
contractors.blurb: Tell us what you need and where — 6 will rank vetted candidates by rating, distance, and your filters.
contractors.noResults: No contractors matched those filters. Try widening the radius or relaxing the rating floor.
contractors.noGeolocation: Your browser doesn't support geolocation. Type a lat/lng instead.
contractors.geolocationDenied: Couldn't read your location. Type a lat/lng instead.

recommend.loading: 6 is weighing rating, distance, and your preferences…
recommend.empty: 6 didn't find any candidates worth recommending. Widen the filters and try again.
recommend.title: 6's top picks
recommend.subtitle: {count, plural, =1 {1 pick} other {# picks}}

picker.confirm: Picking this contractor will send a win notification to them and a 'thanks, here's how to win next time' note to every other candidate. Continue?
picker.signInRequired: Sign in to pick a contractor.
picker.title: 6 has notified the candidates
picker.losersLabel: {count, plural, =1 {Other candidate notified} other {# other candidates notified}}

payment.amountPrompt: Enter the agreed amount in dollars (e.g. 500):
payment.amountInvalid: Amount must be a positive number of dollars.
payment.notConfigured: Payments aren't configured yet on the platform. 6 will be ready to charge once Stripe keys are set.
payment.contractorNotOnboarded: This contractor hasn't set up payouts yet — pick another, or try again later.

return.subtitlePaid: 6 confirmed the payment. The contractor has been notified and we'll connect you.
return.subtitleProcessing: Thanks — Stripe is finalizing the charge. 6 will notify the contractor as soon as it's confirmed.
return.subtitleCanceled: No charge was made. You can pick someone else or come back later.

pickResult.title: 6 has notified the candidates
pickResult.losersLabel: {count, plural, =1 {Other candidate notified} other {# other candidates notified}}

compare.empty: No candidates to compare. Widen the search and try again.

appointment.empty: Nothing on your calendar right now.

general.title: Something went wrong.
general.blurb: 6 hit a snag. The error has been reported.

global.title: Something went very wrong.
global.blurb: The page could not load. We've been notified.
